## What does this PR do?
<!-- One sentence summary -->

## Type
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — config, deps, scripts
- [ ] test — tests only

## Checklist
- [ ] Runs without errors locally (`pnpm dev`)
- [ ] No console.log left in production paths
- [ ] Types are correct — no `any` shortcuts
- [ ] If Anchor program changed — `sync-idl.sh` has been run
- [ ] If new env var added — `.env.example` is updated
